title: NHKマイルCの後に・芝でも砂でも

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm baaack! I had myself an amazing time!
choice_data_list: You did so well—and in a G1 race, too!
You did so well—and in a G1 race, too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You're smiling from ear to ear, Trainer! I'm
glad I could make ya so happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep runnin' in all these big races and turn
everybody into real happy campers!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Your performance at the NHK Mile Cup was
absolutely stunning!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, thank ya very much! If it's a sprint, you can
believe I'm takin' the number one spot!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. If you're looking to be crowned
Umamusume of the Year, you'll first have to claim
the URA award in the sprint division.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
However... while the NHK Mile Cup is a G1 race,
only classic-year runners can join.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
The selection for the top sprinter also includes
seasoned senior-year runners. You need to
consider your next moves with that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, I got ya! Seniors, huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wanna race against seniors too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll become the best sprinter there is! And
Umamusume of the Year too, of course!
choice_data_list: Right, let's take on the seniors!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Wait... You're not thinking of becoming the
autumn King of the Mile by winning the Mile
Championship, are you?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship... Now there's a name
that gets my heart thumpin'!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
You'll be up against highly experienced seniors. It
won't be easy to achieve the same results you've
had up until now.

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Trainer, how do you intend to tackle this hurdle?

Otonashi is making perfect sense—it will take a
lot of preparation to compete against the seniors
on equal footing.
So in order to build up that experience...
choice_data_list: We'll take on the Unicorn Stakes first.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The Unicorn Stakes? If I do recall, that's a—

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Um... Isn't that a dirt race?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thought so!

If we're looking to gain more practical know-how,
this race fulfills all our needs.

Plus, Taiki Shuttle has what it takes to run on
anything!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No problem! I'm down to give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll run whichever race ya think is best, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text: Th-that's... simply amazing!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Despite the steep path ahead, you continue to
press on with confidence!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
You've chosen to push her forward, unfettered by
the threat of sand in your eyes or muddy water in
your hair!

text_block_list.name: Otonashi Etsuko
text_block_list.text:
Ahh... The idea that you've steeled yourself for
such dire straits is truly awe-inspiring!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right! I won't let your sacrifice be in vain,
Trainer!

The conversation has gotten a little out of hand,
but regardless, we have the Unicorn Stakes to
prepare for.
